prompt: Design a medieval fantasy guild website with parchment backgrounds, gothic fonts, shield-shaped navigation icons, dragon illustrations, and treasure chest-inspired content containers
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a medieval fantasy guild website. The background features an aged, crinkled parchment texture. All navigational text and headings are rendered in an ornate gothic font. A horizontal navigation bar, positioned at the top of the page, presents links enclosed within stylized, shield-shaped icons. Prominent, intricately detailed dragon illustrations are integrated into the design, such as a large header image or flanking the main content areas. Rectangular content blocks are designed to visually resemble ornate, closed wooden treasure chests, complete with metallic clasps and detailing.
objects: horizontal navigation bar at top of page
rectangular content blocks resembling ornate, closed wooden treasure chests
metallic clasps and detailing on content blocks
